title: sorghum fulvum
intro: Sorghum fulvum, also known as broom sorghum, is a perennial grass native to Australia and Asia, characterized by its tall stature and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Sorghum fulvum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat a range of ailments.
